faq.question: Why does distance matter so much?
faq.answer: Force decreases with the square of distance — doubling distance reduces force to 1/4.

faq.question: Is the Gravitational Force Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard science and research formulas trusted by researchers and curious minds. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What mass 1 should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate mass 1 value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Gravitational Force Calculator?
sections.body: The Gravitational Force Calculator is a free online tool designed for researchers and curious minds who need quick, accurate calculations in the science and research space. By entering your mass 1, mass 2, distance, you get instant results including gravitational force, acceleration on mass 2. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting gravitational force right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In science and research, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by researchers and curious minds worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to explore scientific concepts with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your mass 1 and need to find the right gravitational force. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Mass 1 (kg)
howToSteps.description: Type or select your mass 1 in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Mass 2 (kg)
howToSteps.description: Type or select your mass 2 in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.description: Type or select your distance in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your gravitational force, acceleration on mass 2. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your mass 1 before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
